word: G1463 - ἐγκομβόομαι - enkombóomai - eng-kom-bo'-om-ahee - Be clothed with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be clothed with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to fasten or gird on oneself

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from G1722 κομβόω komboō (to gird); to engirdle oneself (for labor), that is, figuratively (the apron being a badge of servitude) to wear (in token of mutual deference): - be clothed with.
